content: I will modify [AIAdvisor.tsx](file:///Users/apple/Documents/ai%20-%20projects/star-health-web/src/components/AIAdvisor.tsx) using the `multi_replace_file_content` tool to implement the side-by-side layout, replacing the blocking fullscreen moral overlay with a split grid where the moral narration panel sits on the left and the active questions sit on the right.

args.Description: "Implement side-by-side layout for wizard questionnaire: left column displays solemn moral narration with glowing beating icon; right column hosts active question inputs and operations. Remove fullscreen transition overlay block, reset, and narration helper states."
args.Instruction: "Remove stepNarrationAcknowledged state, implement split grid layout inside Card Body, clean up Redo button click handler, and remove full card overlay."
args.toolAction: "Converting moral narration overlays to side by side layout"
